summary: Classified remaining Devpilot deliverable gaps into source-backed slices: S004 real-agent runtime operability, S005 terminal runtime E2E verification-first, S006 final permission/product E2E gate, plus later S007/S008 candidates for multi-instance coordination and production remote-orphan governance.

verification.method: Scoped document/code evidence mapping; no build required for read-only classification.

risks: S003 did not run runtime E2E; it only classified the backlog source of truth.
Multi-instance coordination and remote-orphan production governance remain queued candidates, not closed.
